title: The Fractional Korn Inequality on Uniform Domains and New Korn Inequalities for Truncated Seminorms
summary: We prove the so-called second case of the fractional Korn inequality for uniform domains. We obtain this result as an application of a novel fractional Korn-type inequality formulated in terms of truncated seminorms, which turns out to be valid for the broader class of John domains. We also obtain weighted estimates in which the weights are certain powers of the distance to the boundary that depend on the fractional exponent and the Assouad codimension of the boundary of the domain.

AI.tldr: 证明了均匀域上的分数阶Korn不等式的"第二种情形"，并建立了更广泛的John域上的截断半范分数Korn型不等式。
AI.motivation: 分数阶Korn不等式是经典Korn不等式在分数阶Sobolev空间中的推广，对于研究分数阶弹性理论和非局部偏微分方程至关重要。论文旨在解决均匀域上的分数阶Korn不等式第二种情形，并扩展到更一般的John域。
AI.techniques: 使用截断半范方法构建分数Korn型不等式，结合John域的分析性质，并应用加权估计技术，其中权重为边界距离的幂函数，依赖于分数指数和边界的Assouad余维数。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 均匀域上的分数阶Korn不等式第二种情形的证明；2. John域上的截断半范分数Korn型不等式；3. 包含边界距离权重的加权估计结果。
AI.significance: 扩展了分数阶Korn不等式的适用范围，为分数阶弹性理论和相关非局部偏微分方程提供了重要的分析工具，加权估计结果对边界奇异性分析有重要应用价值。

title: Generalized Pohozhaev's identity for radial solutions of $p$-Laplace equations
summary: We derive a generalized Pohozhaev's identity for radial solutions of $p$-Laplace equations, by using the approach in [5], thus extending the work of H. Brézis and L. Nirenberg [2], where this identity was implicitly used for the Laplace equation.

AI.tldr: 将Pohozaev恒等式从Laplace方程推广到p-Laplace方程的径向解情形
AI.motivation: Brézis和Nirenberg在Laplace方程中隐含使用了Pohozaev恒等式，本文旨在将这一重要恒等式推广到更一般的p-Laplace方程，特别是针对径向解的情形
AI.techniques: 采用文献[5]中的方法，推导广义Pohozaev恒等式，将经典恒等式从Laplace算子推广到p-Laplace算子
AI.main_theorems: 建立了p-Laplace方程径向解的广义Pohozaev恒等式，这是对Brézis-Nirenberg工作的直接推广
AI.significance: 扩展了Pohozaev恒等式的适用范围，为研究p-Laplace方程的非存在性、唯一性和解的性质提供了重要工具，在非线性椭圆方程理论中有广泛应用

title: Global Existence for General Systems of Isentropic Gas Dynamics via a Weighted Pressure Perturbation Approach
summary: This paper establishes the global existence of bounded entropy solutions to the one-dimensional system of isentropic gas dynamics with general pressure laws, allowing for the presence of vacuum states. We introduce a novel regularization scheme based on a weighted pressure perturbation of the form $\tilde{P}(ρ,δ) = \int_δ^ρs^{-2}(s^2P'(s) - δ^2 P'(δ)) \, ds$. Unlike previous methods that modify the continuity equation, our approach strictly preserves mass conservation while creating a degenerate hyperbolic boundary at the cut-off density $ρ=δ$. We provide a rigorous derivation of the eigenstructure and Riemann invariants for the perturbed system. A key theoretical contribution is the proof that the perturbed pressure exactly inherits the convexity properties of the original state equation ($2\tilde{P}'+ρ\tilde{P}'' = 2P'+ρP''$), thereby ensuring the strict convexity of the mechanical energy entropy without additional assumptions. Using the method of vanishing viscosity, we derive uniform $L^\infty$ bounds via invariant regions and establish the $H^{-1}_{\mathrm{loc}}$ compactness of entropy dissipation measures. The global existence for the vacuum-free limit is then proved using the theory of compensated compactness and singular perturbation analysis of the entropy equations.

AI.tldr: 建立了具有一般压力定律的一维等熵气体动力学系统在有真空态情况下的有界熵解全局存在性
AI.motivation: 研究具有一般压力定律的一维等熵气体动力学系统，允许真空态存在，解决这类系统全局解的存在性问题
AI.techniques: 引入加权压力扰动正则化方案，保持质量守恒；使用消失粘性法、不变区域方法、补偿紧致理论和奇异摄动分析
AI.main_theorems: 证明了扰动压力精确继承原状态方程的凸性性质，建立了有界熵解的全局存在性，获得了均匀L∞估计和熵耗散测度的局部H^{-1}紧致性
AI.significance: 为具有一般压力定律和真空态的气体动力学系统提供了新的正则化框架，在数学上严格处理了真空边界问题，扩展了可压缩流理论

title: Phase-Textured Complex Viscosity in Linear Viscous Flows: Non-Normality Without Advection, Corner Defects, and 3D Mode Coupling
summary:
We consider time-harmonic incompressible flow with a spatially resolved complex viscosity field $μ^*(\mathbf{x},ω)$ and, at fixed forcing frequency $ω>0$, its constitutive phase texture $\varphi(\mathbf{x})=\argμ^*(\mathbf{x},ω)$. In three-dimensional domains periodic in a spanwise direction $z$, $z$-dependence of $μ^*$ converts coefficient multiplication into convolution in spanwise Fourier index, yielding an operator-valued Toeplitz/Laurent coupling of modes. Consequently, even spanwise-uniform forcing generically produces $κ\neq 0$ sidebands in the harmonic response as a \emph{linear, constitutive} effect.
  We place $μ^*$ at the closure level $\hat{\boldsymbolτ}=2\,μ^*(\mathbf{x},ω)\mathbf{D}(\hat{\mathbf{v}})$, as the boundary value of the Laplace transform of a causal stress-memory kernel. Under the passivity condition $\Reμ^*(\mathbf{x},ω)\ge μ_{\min}>0$, the oscillatory Stokes/Oseen operators are realized as m-sectorial operators associated with coercive sectorial forms on bounded Lipschitz (including cornered) domains, yielding existence, uniqueness, and frequency-dependent stability bounds.
  Spatial variation of $\varphi$ renders the viscous operator intrinsically non-normal even in the absence of advection, so amplification is governed by resolvent geometry (and associated pseudospectra), not by eigenvalues alone. In the pure-phase class $μ^*(\mathbf{x},ω)=μ_0(ω)e^{i\varphi(\mathbf{x})}$, the texture strength is quantified by $μ_0(ω)\|\nabla\varphi\|_{L^\infty}$.

AI.tldr: 研究了具有空间变化复粘度场的时谐不可压缩流动，揭示了相位纹理如何通过Toeplitz/Laurent算子耦合模式，并建立了在被动条件下的适定性和稳定性理论。
AI.motivation: 研究具有空间变化复粘度场的时谐不可压缩流动，特别关注粘度相位纹理对流动响应的影响。复粘度场来源于应力记忆核的拉普拉斯变换边界值，这种空间变化导致线性本构效应下产生非零边带响应。
AI.techniques: 采用算子值Toeplitz/Laurent理论处理跨向傅里叶模式耦合；利用m-扇形算子理论和扇形形式建立适定性；通过伪谱分析研究非正规算子放大机制；在被动条件下使用强制扇形形式。
AI.main_theorems: 在被动条件Reμ*≥μ_min>0下，振荡Stokes/Oseen算子实现为有界Lipschitz域上强制扇形形式关联的m-扇形算子，从而得到解的存在性、唯一性和频率依赖稳定性界；相位变化导致粘性算子本质非正规，放大由预解几何而非仅特征值控制。
AI.significance: 为具有复杂本构关系的非牛顿流体流动提供了严格的数学框架；揭示了相位纹理如何通过线性本构效应产生模式耦合；建立了在被动条件下的稳定性理论；为非正规算子放大机制在复杂流体中的应用提供了理论基础。

title: Electromagnetic Scattering by a Cluster of Hybrid Dielectric-Plasmonic Dimers
summary:
We consider time-harmonic electromagnetic scattering by a cluster of hybrid dielectric-plasmonic dimers in $\mathbb{R}^3$. Each dimer consists of a high-contrast dielectric nanoparticle and a moderately contrasting plasmonic nanoparticle separated by a subwavelength distance. The cluster is assumed to contain many such dimers whose size $a$ is small compared to the wavelength, with intra-dimer and inter-dimer distances scaling like $a^{t_1}$ and $a^{t_2}$, and the frequency is tuned near suitable electric and magnetic resonances of the associated Newtonian and magnetization operators on the reference shapes.
  Under these geometric, contrast and spectral assumptions, we derive a Foldy--Lax type approximation for the Maxwell system. We show that the scattered field and its far field admit asymptotic expansions in terms of four moments attached to each dimer, which solve an explicit finite-dimensional linear system. We prove invertibility of this system under quantitative smallness conditions on the contrast and the dimer density, and we obtain error estimates uniform in the number of dimers.
  By extracting the dominant components, we further show that each hybrid dimer behaves, at leading order, as a co-located electric and magnetic dipole driven by the local fields, and we identify the corresponding $6\times 6$ polarizability matrix. This provides a discrete model for clusters of hybrid dimers that is suitable for fast forward simulations, inverse schemes, and as input for effective-medium descriptions. In particular, it suggests parameter regimes where clusters of hybrid dimers can generate (double) negative effective permittivity and permeability and bi-anisotropic constitutive laws and eventually hyperbolic media.

AI.tldr: 建立了混合电介质-等离子体二聚体簇的Foldy-Lax型近似理论，揭示了其等效电磁偶极子行为和负折射率材料设计原理。
AI.motivation: 研究亚波长尺度下混合电介质-等离子体二聚体簇的电磁散射问题，旨在建立适用于快速模拟、反演方案和有效介质描述的离散模型，为设计负折射率材料和双各向异性介质提供理论基础。
AI.techniques: 使用Foldy-Lax近似方法、渐近展开技术、牛顿势和磁化算子共振分析、有限维线性系统可逆性证明、均匀误差估计。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 推导了Maxwell系统的Foldy-Lax型近似；2) 证明了散射场和远场可用四个矩的渐近展开表示；3) 建立了有限维线性系统的可逆性条件；4) 揭示了每个二聚体在主导阶上表现为共位的电磁偶极子；5) 确定了对应的6×6极化率矩阵。
AI.significance: 为混合纳米结构的光学性质提供了严格的数学框架，为设计具有负介电常数、负磁导率、双各向异性本构关系乃至双曲介质的新型超材料提供了理论指导，具有重要的应用前景。

title: Global compressible Euler-Poisson limit of the ionic Vlasov-Poisson-Boltzmann system for all cutoff potentials
summary: The ionic Vlasov-Poisson-Boltzmann system is a fundamental model in dilute collisional plasmas. In this work, we study the compressible ionic Euler-Poisson limit of the ionic Vlasov-Poisson-Boltzmann system for the full range of cutoff potentials $-3 < γ\leq 1$. By employing a truncated Hilbert expansion together with a novel weighted $H^1_{x,v}$-$W^{1,\infty}_{x,v}$ framework, we prove that the solution of the ionic Vlasov-Poisson-Boltzmann converges globally in time to the smooth global solution of the compressible ionic Euler-Poisson system.

AI.tldr: 证明了离子Vlasov-Poisson-Boltzmann系统在全范围截断势能下向可压缩离子Euler-Poisson系统的全局收敛性
AI.motivation: 离子Vlasov-Poisson-Boltzmann系统是稀薄碰撞等离子体中的基本模型，研究其向流体力学极限的收敛性具有重要物理意义，特别是对于全范围截断势能的情况
AI.techniques: 采用截断Hilbert展开结合新颖的加权$H^1_{x,v}$-$W^{1,\infty}_{x,v}$框架，处理截断势能$-3 < γ\leq 1$的全范围情况
AI.main_theorems: 证明了离子Vlasov-Poisson-Boltzmann系统的解全局时间收敛于可压缩离子Euler-Poisson系统的光滑全局解
AI.significance: 建立了稀薄等离子体模型中动理学描述向流体力学描述的严格数学联系，扩展了截断势能范围，为等离子体物理提供了更完整的理论基础

title: Regularity theory for sub-critical $p$-parabolic systems with measurable coefficients
summary: A quantitative regularity theory is developed for weak solutions to the parabolic system $$ \partial_t u-\mathrm{div}\,{\boldsymbol{\mathsf A}}(x,t,Du)=0 \quad\text{in }E_T\subset \mathbb{R}^N\times\mathbb{R}, $$ which features the $p$-Laplacian with measurable coefficients. We focus on the sub-critical range $1<p\le \tfrac{2N}{N+2}$ and obtain two main results. \emph{Local boundedness:} starting from an $L^{\boldsymbol{\mathsf r}}$-control of $u$ with ${\boldsymbol{\mathsf r}}>\frac{N(2-p)}{p}$, we derive sharp, scale-invariant $L^\infty$-estimates. \emph{Higher integrability of the gradient:} $|Du|$ self-improves from $L^p_{\mathrm{loc}}$ to $L^{p(1+\varepsilon)}_{\mathrm{loc}}$ for some $\varepsilon>0$ depending only on the data. The same results still hold given proper source terms.

AI.tldr: 为具有可测系数的p-Laplacian抛物系统建立了定量正则性理论，包括局部有界性和梯度的高可积性
AI.motivation: 研究具有可测系数的p-Laplacian抛物系统的正则性问题，特别关注次临界范围1<p≤2N/(N+2)，解决弱解的正则性估计
AI.techniques: 使用De Giorgi迭代方法、Moser迭代技术、尺度不变估计、自改进论证和能量方法
AI.main_theorems: 两个主要结果：1) 局部有界性：从L^r控制出发得到尖锐的尺度不变L^∞估计；2) 梯度的高可积性：|Du|从L^p_loc自改进到L^{p(1+ε)}_loc
AI.significance: 为具有可测系数的退化抛物系统建立了完整的定量正则性理论，扩展了p-Laplacian方程的正则性结果，为后续研究提供了分析框架

title: Non-local singular perturbations of non-convex functionals -- recent results
summary: Singular perturbations have been used to select solutions of (non-convex) variational problems with a multiplicity of minimizers. The prototype of such an approach is the gradient theory of phase transitions by L. Modica, who specialized some earlier Gamma-convergence results by himself and S. Mortola contained in a seminal paper, validating the so-called minimal-interface criterion. I will give an overview of some recent results on perturbations with fractional and higher-order seminorms both in the framework of phase transitions and of free-discontinuity problems, relating these results with the Bourgain-Brezis-Mironescu and Maz'ya-Shaposhnikova limit analysis for fractional Sobolev seminorms, and with the theory of Gamma-expansions.

AI.tldr: 该论文综述了使用分数阶和高阶半范数奇异摄动方法选择变分问题解的最新进展。
AI.motivation: 研究背景源于非凸变分问题存在多个极小值解时，如何通过奇异摄动方法选择特定解。核心动机是扩展Modica的相变梯度理论，将其推广到分数阶和高阶半范数摄动情形。
AI.techniques: 主要技术包括Gamma收敛理论、分数阶Sobolev空间半范数、Bourgain-Brezis-Mironescu和Maz'ya-Shaposhnikova极限分析、Gamma展开理论，以及自由不连续问题的分析方法。
AI.main_theorems: 综述了相变和自由不连续问题中分数阶和高阶半范数摄动的最新结果，建立了这些结果与分数阶Sobolev半范数极限分析及Gamma展开理论的联系。
AI.significance: 理论意义在于统一了奇异摄动方法的不同框架，将经典相变理论推广到更一般的分数阶和高阶情形，为变分问题解的选择提供了更丰富的数学工具。

title: Dynamic representation of the Weyl solution for the Schrödinger operator on the semi-axis
summary: We derive a representation formula for the Weyl solution to the Schrödinger operator on the semi-axis for certain classes of potentials. Our approach is based on relations with the initial-boundary value problem for the wave equation with the same potential on the half-line.

AI.tldr: 建立了半轴上薛定谔算子Weyl解的表示公式，通过其与半线上波动方程初边值问题的联系
AI.motivation: 研究半轴上薛定谔算子的谱理论和散射理论，特别是Weyl解的性质，这对于理解量子力学中半无限区域上的势场问题具有重要意义
AI.techniques: 利用半线上波动方程的初边值问题与薛定谔算子的联系，通过波方程方法推导表示公式
AI.main_theorems: 对特定势函数类，建立了半轴上薛定谔算子Weyl解的显式表示公式
AI.significance: 为半轴上薛定谔算子的谱分析提供了新工具，连接了波动方程和薛定谔方程的理论，在量子散射理论和逆问题中有潜在应用

title: Energy-variational solutions for geodynamical two-phase flows -- From logarithmic to double-obstacle potentials by variational convergence
summary: In [Cheng, Lasarzik, Thomas 2025 ARXIV-Preprint 2509.25508], we studied a Cahn--Hilliard two-phase model describing the flow of two viscoelastoplastic fluids in the framework of dissipative solutions using a logarithmic potential for the phase-field variable. This choice of potential has the effect that the fluid mixture cannot fully separate into two pure phases. The notion of dissipative solutions is based on a relative energy-dissipation inequality featuring a suitable regularity weight. In this way, this is a very weak solution concept. In the present work, we study the well-posedness of the geodynamical two-phase flow in the notion of energy-variational solutions. They feature an additional scalar energy variable that majorizes the system energy along solutions and they are further characterized by a variational inequality that combines an energy-dissipation estimate with the weak formulation of the system adding an error term that accounts for the mismatch between the energy variable and the system energy multiplied by a suitable regularity weight. We give a comparison of these two concepts. We further study different phase-field potentials for the geodynamical two-phase flow model. In particular, we address the variational limit from a potential with a logarithmic contribution to a double-obstacle potential, then also allowing for the emergence of pure phases. This study underlines that, thanks to its structure, the energy-variational solution is better suited for variational convergence methods than the dissipative solution.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了地球动力学两相流模型的能量-变分解概念，并与耗散解进行比较，同时分析了不同相场势的变分极限。
AI.motivation: 研究地球动力学中两相粘弹塑性流体流动的数学建模问题，特别关注相场变量势函数的选择（对数势与双障碍势）及其对相分离的影响，以及不同弱解概念（耗散解与能量-变分解）的比较。
AI.techniques: 使用能量-变分解框架，基于相对能量-耗散不等式和变分不等式，引入正则化权重和额外能量变量；采用变分收敛方法分析不同相场势的极限行为。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了地球动力学两相流模型的能量-变分解适定性理论；证明了从对数势到双障碍势的变分极限，允许纯相的出现；比较了耗散解与能量-变分解两种弱解概念的优劣。
AI.significance: 为地球动力学两相流问题提供了更灵活的弱解框架，能量-变分解结构更适合变分收敛分析，对数势到双障碍势的极限研究揭示了相分离行为的数学机制。

title: A selection principle for 2D steady Euler flows via the vanishing viscosity limit
summary:
The 2D Euler system, governing inviscid incompressible flow, admits infinitely many steady solutions. To identify which are physically realizable, we investigate the vanishing viscosity limit of the steady Navier-Stokes system. Here, a steady Euler flow with a slip boundary condition is called a vanishing viscosity limit if it is the $L^\infty_{\textup{loc}}\cap H^1_{\textup{loc}}$ limit of steady Navier-Stokes solutions (it is known that strong boundary layers can persist). We then completely classify the vanishing viscosity limit in specific planar domains.
  In a bounded connected domain, we show that the only vanishing viscosity limit is the constant-vorticity flow. This result does not require the approximating Navier-Stokes solutions to have nested closed streamlines, an essential assumption in the century-old Prandtl-Batchelor theorem. In a strip where the Navier-Stokes velocity (but not the pressure) is periodic in the strip direction, we show that the only vanishing viscosity limits are constant flow, Couette flow, and Poiseuille flow. The proof of the latter result relies on the former and on a powerful rigidity theorem, which asserts that any non-shear steady Euler flow in a periodic strip must have contractible closed streamlines.

AI.tldr: 完全分类了特定平面区域中稳态Navier-Stokes方程的消失粘性极限，揭示了物理可实现的稳态Euler流
AI.motivation: 研究2D Euler系统存在无穷多稳态解，但需要确定哪些是物理可实现的；通过研究稳态Navier-Stokes方程的消失粘性极限来识别物理上可实现的稳态Euler流
AI.techniques: 消失粘性极限分析、边界层理论、刚性定理应用、局部收敛性分析（$L^\infty_{\textup{loc}}\cap H^1_{\textup{loc}}$极限）、流线拓扑结构分析
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在有界连通区域中，唯一的消失粘性极限是常涡量流；2. 在带状区域中，唯一的消失粘性极限是常流、Couette流和Poiseuille流
AI.significance: 突破了百年Prandtl-Batchelor定理需要嵌套封闭流线的假设，为物理可实现的稳态Euler流提供了完整分类，对流体力学基础理论有重要贡献

title: Subdiffusive fractional limit of a jump-renewal equation
summary: In this paper, we consider an age-structured jump model that arises as a description of continuous time random walks with infinite mean waiting time between jumps. We prove that under a suitable rescaling, this equation converges in the long time large scale limit to a time fractional subdiffusion equation.

AI.tldr: 证明了年龄结构跳跃模型在适当重标度下长时间大尺度极限收敛于时间分数阶次扩散方程
AI.motivation: 研究具有无限平均等待时间的连续时间随机行走的年龄结构模型，这类模型描述反常扩散现象，需要建立其与分数阶扩散方程的联系
AI.techniques: 使用重标度分析、极限理论、分数阶微积分方法，通过长时间大尺度极限建立收敛性
AI.main_theorems: 证明了年龄结构跳跃模型在适当重标度下收敛于时间分数阶次扩散方程，建立了微观随机模型与宏观分数阶PDE的严格数学联系
AI.significance: 为反常扩散现象提供了严格的数学基础，建立了随机行走模型与分数阶偏微分方程之间的桥梁，对理解复杂系统中的输运过程有重要意义

title: Non-local planelike minimizers and $Γ$-convergence of periodic energies to a local anisotropic perimeter
summary: We investigate a homogenization problem related to a non-local interface energy with a periodic forcing term. We show the existence of planelike minimizers for such energy. Moreover, we prove that, under suitable assumptions on the non-local kernel and the external field, the sequence of rescaled energies $Γ$-converges to a suitable local anisotropic perimeter, where the anisotropy is defined as the limit of the normalized energy of a planelike minimizer in larger and larger cubes (i.e., what is called in jargon "stable norm"). To obtain this, we also establish several auxiliary results, including: the minimality of the level sets of the minimizers, explicit bounds on the oscillations of the minimizers, density estimates for almost minimizers, and non-local perimeter estimates in the large.

AI.tldr: 证明了非局部界面能量周期强迫项的齐次化问题中平面状极小元的存在性，并建立了能量Γ-收敛到局部各向异性周长的结果。
AI.motivation: 研究具有周期强迫项的非局部界面能量的齐次化问题，这类问题在材料科学和相变理论中具有重要意义，特别是当界面能量具有非局部特性且受外部周期场影响时。
AI.techniques: 使用Γ-收敛理论、平面状极小元构造、密度估计、振荡控制、非局部周长估计等分析工具，通过稳定范数定义各向异性。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 平面状极小元的存在性定理；2) 重标度能量的Γ-收敛到局部各向异性周长；3) 极小元水平集的最小性；4) 极小元振荡的显式界；5) 几乎极小元的密度估计；6) 大尺度下的非局部周长估计。
AI.significance: 为非局部界面问题的齐次化理论提供了系统框架，建立了非局部能量到局部各向异性周长的收敛性，对理解具有周期结构的非局部界面现象有重要理论价值。

title: A free boundary problem in accretive growth
summary: We prove an existence result for a free boundary problem inspired by the modelization of accretive growth. The growth process is formulated through a level-set approach, leading to a boundary-value problem for a Hamilton-Jacobi equation within a prescribed constraining set. Existence, variational representability, and regularity of solutions to the growth subproblem are investigated. The full system arises from coupling the growth dynamics with an elliptic equation for the activation field. Existence of solutions to the fully coupled free boundary problems is obtained via an iterative procedure.

AI.tldr: 证明了受增生生长模型启发的自由边界问题解的存在性
AI.motivation: 研究受增生生长过程启发的自由边界问题，该过程通过水平集方法建模，导致在约束集内的Hamilton-Jacobi方程边值问题
AI.techniques: 水平集方法、Hamilton-Jacobi方程理论、变分表示、迭代程序、椭圆方程耦合分析
AI.main_theorems: 证明了增长子问题解的存在性、变分可表示性和正则性；通过迭代法获得了完全耦合自由边界问题解的存在性
AI.significance: 为增生生长模型提供了严格的数学基础，发展了处理耦合自由边界问题的新方法，对材料科学和生物力学中的生长建模有重要意义

title: Failure of uniqueness for scalar conservation laws
summary: In this article, we develop what are, to the best of our knowledge, the first negative results for scalar conservation laws. We begin with explicit examples where bounded initial data leads to $L^{\infty}$ blow-up despite flux regularity. More strikingly, we demonstrate that Kružkov's entropy equalities alone fail to ensure uniqueness in this regime by constructing infinitely many entropy solutions to a single Cauchy problem with bounded initial datum, each continuous in time with respect to the $L^{1}$ norm. Thus, we demonstrate that the $L^{\infty}$ assumption is essential for the doubling of variables argument, and hence for the uniqueness of entropy solutions to scalar conservation laws. On the positive side, we develop a novel theory for scalar conservation laws with spatial heterogeneity by adapting the front tracking method. We recover uniqueness by imposing a Lax-type condition in addition to the entropy inequality, motivated by the properties of our front tracking approximations. Unbounded Kružkov solutions do not necessarily satisfy the weak formulation; we show that global weak solutions may not even exist in a natural class for some Cauchy problems of this form, even when Kružkov entropy solutions exist. Finally, we construct an explicit example of global ill-posedness with bounded initial datum.

AI.tldr: 首次为标量守恒律建立负结果，证明无界解可能导致L∞爆破、熵解不唯一，并发展空间异质性守恒律的新理论。
AI.motivation: 研究标量守恒律中传统Kružkov熵解理论的基本假设，特别是L∞有界性假设的必要性。探索当初始数据有界但解可能无界时，熵解理论会如何失效。
AI.techniques: 构造性反例方法、波前追踪法（front tracking method）的适应性应用、Lax型条件的引入、变量加倍论证的分析。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 有界初值导致L∞爆破的显式例子；2) 单个柯西问题存在无穷多个熵解，证明Kružkov熵等式不足以保证唯一性；3) 无界Kružkov解可能不满足弱形式；4) 发展空间异质性守恒律的新理论，通过Lax型条件恢复唯一性；5) 构造有界初值下全局不适定的显式例子。
AI.significance: 首次揭示标量守恒律理论中L∞假设的根本必要性，挑战了传统熵解理论的适用范围。为无界解情形建立了新的理论框架，对守恒律理论的基础研究有重要影响。
